enterprise.name: Environmental Plantings Enterprise
enterprise.description: An environmental plantings enterprise: carbon sequestration impacts from the plantings, plus the farm's energy, waste and upstream (Scope 3) emissions.

customSheets.name: Input - Planting
customSheets.description: Site-specific inputs for this enterprise. Has fewer fields than the typical module excel site sheet.

menu.comment: The column-A navigation menu is regenerated on every sheet from the final sheet set. Groups are assigned automatically: Home/Results = untitled; any sheet named 'Input*' = INPUTS; calculation sheets = CALCULATIONS; everything else = APPENDICES. 'labels' overrides the link text for a sheet (default derivation strips the 'Input - ' prefix, otherwise uses the sheet name). Set enabled=false to leave existing menus untouched.
